string.text:
The QBZ-95 rifle, also known as the Norinco Type 95 5.56, is a Chinese assault rifle chambered in 5.56x45mm NATO caliber. It is a variant of the QBZ-95 family of rifles and is in service with the People's Liberation Army (PLA) and other Chinese armed forces. The QBZ-95 5.56 rifle retains the distinct bullpup design of its predecessors, with the action and magazine located behind the trigger. It offers a compact and lightweight build, featuring a polymer construction and ergonomic design for improved handling. Equipped with a gas-operated, rotating bolt system, the rifle ensures reliable performance in various environments. It boasts a top-mounted Picatinny rail for optics and accessories, as well as ambidextrous controls for ease of use by both left- and right-handed shooters. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: Most Picatinny/weaver sights with the exception of low mount optics
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Silencer: Suppressor: 5.56 NATO Standard Suppressor
